entries.label: DRIVERS ARE TO COMPLETE THIS FORM EVERY TIME A CONTAINER IS MOVED.  EACH DRIVER IS RESPONSIBLE FOR ONLY THE CONTAINERS MOVED BY HIM/HER ON A GIVEN DAY.
THE INFORMATION PROVIDED ON THIS FORM SHOULD REFLECT THE MOVEMENTS OF ONE CONTAINER IN ONE DAY BY ONE DRIVER.
MAKE SURE TO PROVIDE THE CONTAINER NUMBER, DRIVER NAME, AND THE DATE AT THE TOP OF THE FORM.
RETURN THE FORM TO THE WASTE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT.
•	IF AN EMPTY CONTAINER IS SPOTTED ON A JOB SITE, SECTION 1 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF AN EMPTY ROLL-OFF IS SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, FULL, THAT SAME DAY BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.

•	IF AN EMPTY ROLL-OFF IS SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED, TRANSPORTED TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, THAT SAME DAY BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLL-OF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, EMPTY, SECTION 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLLOFF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, SECTION 1 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLL-OFF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, FULL, BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL OR EMPTY CONTAINER IS RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD FROM A JOB SITE OR A VENDOR’S YARD, SECTION 2 WILL BE COMPLETED

•	COMPLETE THE BOTTOM SECTION OF THIS FORM WHEN SPOTTING A CONTAINER AT A SITE FOR THE CUSTOMER TO FILL.  THE CONDITION OF THE CONTAINER SHOULD BE REVIEWED WITH THE CUSTOMER AND THEN THE CUSTOMER SHOULD SIGN AND DATE THE FORM.
•	COMPLETE THE BOTTOM SECTION OF THIS FORM WHEN A CONTAINER NEEDS REPAIR OR MAINTENANCE.  MAKE A COPY OF THIS FORM AND PROVIDE TO FLEET COORDINATOR.
DRIVERS ARE TO COMPLETE THIS FORM EVERY TIME A CONTAINER IS MOVED.  EACH DRIVER IS RESPONSIBLE FOR ONLY THE CONTAINERS MOVED BY HIM/HER ON A GIVEN DAY.
THE INFORMATION PROVIDED ON THIS FORM SHOULD REFLECT THE MOVEMENTS OF ONE CONTAINER IN ONE DAY BY ONE DRIVER.
MAKE SURE TO PROVIDE THE CONTAINER NUMBER, DRIVER NAME, AND THE DATE AT THE TOP OF THE FORM.
RETURN THE FORM TO THE WASTE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT.
•	IF AN EMPTY CONTAINER IS SPOTTED ON A JOB SITE, SECTION 1 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF AN EMPTY ROLL-OFF IS SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, FULL, THAT SAME DAY BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.

•	IF AN EMPTY ROLL-OFF IS SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED, TRANSPORTED TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, THAT SAME DAY BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLL-OF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, EMPTY, SECTION 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLLOFF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, SECTION 1 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL ROLL-OFF IS TAKEN TO A DISPOSAL FACILITY, EMPTIED AND THEN SPOTTED AT A JOB SITE, FILLED AND RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD, FULL, BY THE SAME DRIVER, SECTIONS 1 AND 2 WILL BE COMPLETED.
•	IF A FULL OR EMPTY CONTAINER IS RETURNED TO THE LEWIS YARD FROM A JOB SITE OR A VENDOR’S YARD, SECTION 2 WILL BE COMPLETED

•	COMPLETE THE BOTTOM SECTION OF THIS FORM WHEN SPOTTING A CONTAINER AT A SITE FOR THE CUSTOMER TO FILL.  THE CONDITION OF THE CONTAINER SHOULD BE REVIEWED WITH THE CUSTOMER AND THEN THE CUSTOMER SHOULD SIGN AND DATE THE FORM.
•	COMPLETE THE BOTTOM SECTION OF THIS FORM WHEN A CONTAINER NEEDS REPAIR OR MAINTENANCE.  MAKE A COPY OF THIS FORM AND PROVIDE TO FLEET COORDINATOR.
